summary: Settings page frontend testing complete. All settings toggles work correctly and persist to localStorage via SettingsContext. Nested settings like tabBar.home work correctly using dot notation. Theme toggle (dark/light) works. All WhatsApp-style settings from user screenshots are functional.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection closes immediately - pre-existing issue

issues: Settings content area appears very light/faded in light mode - text contrast could be improved

passed_tests: Settings page loads with all sections visible
Theme toggle (Dark/Light) works - persists to localStorage
Security Section - 2FA toggle works (data-testid='2fa-toggle')
Security Section - Biometric toggle works (data-testid='biometric-toggle')
Privacy Controls - Private Account toggle works (data-testid='private-account-toggle')
Privacy Controls - Activity Status toggle works (data-testid='activity-status-toggle')
Privacy Controls - Read Receipts toggle works (data-testid='read-receipts-toggle')
Ad Preferences - Personalized Ads toggle works (data-testid='personalized-ads-toggle')
Ad Preferences - Partner Ads toggle works (data-testid='partner-ads-toggle')
Tab Bar - Home toggle works with nested key tabBar.home (data-testid='tabbar-home-toggle')
Tab Bar - Chat toggle works with nested key tabBar.chat (data-testid='tabbar-chat-toggle')
Tab Bar - AI toggle works with nested key tabBar.ai (data-testid='tabbar-ai-toggle')
Tab Bar - Reels toggle works with nested key tabBar.reels (data-testid='tabbar-reels-toggle')
Media - Autoplay Videos toggle works (data-testid='autoplay-videos-toggle')
Time Management - Daily Reminder toggle works (data-testid='daily-reminder-toggle')
Browser - In-App Browser toggle works (data-testid='in-app-browser-toggle')
Sharing Suggestions - Suggest Photos toggle works (data-testid='suggest-photos-toggle')
Sharing Suggestions - Suggest People toggle works (data-testid='suggest-people-toggle')
All settings persist to localStorage via SettingsContext
Nested settings (tabBar.home, tabBar.chat, etc.) work correctly with dot notation
critical_code_review_comments: SettingsContext.jsx updateSetting() correctly handles nested keys using dot notation (e.g., 'tabBar.home')
All settings toggles have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Settings persist to localStorage automatically via useEffect
Default settings include all WhatsApp-style settings requested by user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings page fully tested. All toggles work and persist to localStorage. SettingsContext updateSetting() supports nested keys with dot notation (e.g., 'tabBar.home'). Test user settingstest@test.com / Test123! can be used. Direct navigation to /settings works after login. Settings sidebar button opens a popup/modal rather than navigating directly.
mocked_apis_note: All settings are stored in localStorage via SettingsContext - no backend API calls for settings
